title: PartyWoo Purple Star Foil Balloons 6pcs Different Sizes Pack of 27 22 Inch Large Lavender Explosion Spike Mylar Balloons for Birthday Bachelorette Anniversary Engagement Butterfly Party Decorations
features: 14-Pointed Explosion Starburst Balloons: The package includes 27 inch star balloons (3 pcs), 22 inch star balloons (3 pcs), 10m / 32.8ft ribbon (1 pc) and inflation straw (1 pc). All the 6 pcs star balloons are one-piece star balloons with 14 cones, so you do not have to assemble the cones on by yourself

One-Piece and Installation-Free: These 6 pcs explosion star balloons are one-piece star balloons with 14 cones. All you need to do is to inflate 6 pcs balloons up. No more learning and fighting with user manual and troublesome assembling steps. Easy and time saving

Reusable and High Quality: The large star foil balloons are made of Nylon Aluminium Foil, which is durable, keeps inflated for long time and reusable. With the inflation straw included, it is easy to inflate and deflate

What to Fill With: These foil balloons can be filled with air and helium, but it could NOT float with HELIUM due to the irregular balloon shape. Please inflate it SLOWLY to avoid popping up. The explosion star balloon could only be 80% full if it is for OUTDOOR use
Applications: These star foil balloons are perfect for party decorations, birthday decorations, anniversary decorations, baby shower decorations, wedding decorations, bridal shower decorations
